title: Hiring Medical Officer at BLK-Max Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at BLK-Max Hospital
jsonLd.description:
BLK-Max Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BLK-Max Hospital:
BLK-Max Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
